name: openclawbrain-workspace
description: TypeScript-first convergence workspace for the public OpenClawBrain repo.
author: Jonathan Gu <jonathangu@gmail.com>

scripts.release:check: pnpm clean && pnpm check && pnpm release:pack
scripts.release:pack: ROOT_DIR=$(pwd) && mkdir -p "$ROOT_DIR/.release" && for pkg in packages/contracts packages/pack-format packages/compiler packages/learner; do (cd "$pkg" && pnpm pack --pack-destination "$ROOT_DIR/.release"); done
